en.title: Unija IT Solution - Regional Student Competition
en.description: Participated in developing a prototype mobile application for the digitization of accounting documentation and data transfer to the ERP system. Contributed to the development of the frontend part of the application and the user flow for photographing and processing documents.

es.title: Unija IT Solution - Regionalno studentsko takmičenje
es.description: Učestvovao u razvoju prototipa mobilne aplikacije za digitalizaciju računovodstvene dokumentacije i prenos podataka ka ERP sistemu. Doprinosio razvoju frontend dijela aplikacije i korisničkog toka za fotografisanje i obradu dokumenata.

en.title: CompTIA A+
en.description: Earned CompTIA A+ certification, demonstrating knowledge in hardware, software, networking, troubleshooting, and IT support best practices.

es.title: CompTIA A+
es.description: Stekao CompTIA A+ sertifikat, koji potvrđuje znanje iz hardvera, softvera, mreža, otklanjanja problema i najboljih praksi za IT podršku.

en.title: Red Cross First Aid Instructor
en.description: Started as a volunteer, helping with the distribution of humanitarian aid and administrative tasks. Earned a First Aid Instructor certificate and conducted professional first aid training for employees.

es.title: Instruktor prve pomoći - Crveni krst
es.description: Započeo kao volonter, gdje sam pomagao pri distribuciji humanitarne pomoći i administrativnim poslovima. Stekao sertifikat Instruktora prve pomoći i sprovodio profesionalne obuke prve pomoći za zaposlene.
